matchmaking.match_desc: You and {{name}} like the same sport ({{sport}}). Start chatting now!

chat.title: Messages
chat.no_contacts: You do not have any followers or followed contacts to create a group chat.
chat.create_squad_hint: Name your group and select the contacts you want to invite.
chat.no_contacts_hint: You can create the Squad now and add contacts once you follow other athletes or they follow you.

wallet.title: FitCoins & Rewards
wallet.subtitle: Your gamified sports economy
wallet.confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to redeem this reward for {{cost}} FitCoins?
wallet.error_desc: Keep playing to earn more FitCoins.
wallet.history_subtitle: Track your FitCoins income and expenses
wallet.no_products: No commercial products available at this time.
wallet.confirm_purchase_desc: Do you want to buy {{name}} for {{price}} FC?
wallet.purchase_error_desc: You don't have enough FitCoins for this item.

profile.title: My profile
profile.no_matches_yet: You have not participated in matches yet.
profile.photo_error: Error uploading photo. Please try again.
profile.follow_success: You are now following this user!

auth.email_invalid_format: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.email_invalid_tld: The email domain must end with a valid TLD (.com, .pe, .edu, .org, .net).
auth.email_invalid_domain: Please enter a valid email from a permitted provider (Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo, Hotmail, iCloud, or ProtonMail).
auth.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
auth.password_uppercase: At least one uppercase letter is required.
auth.password_lowercase: At least one lowercase letter is required.
auth.password_number: At least one number is required.
auth.password_special: At least one special character is required (!@#$%^&*).

feedback.feedback_success: Feedback submitted successfully! Thank you for keeping our community clean.

game_day.checkin_too_far: You are too far from the court (at {{distance}} km). You must be within 100 meters.
game_day.checkin_error: Failed to get location. Please enable GPS.

landing.matchmaking_desc: Our AI analyzes your sports level, Trust Score, location, and preferred times to connect you with the ideal opponents or teammates in minutes.
landing.split_billing_desc: Forget about collecting from everyone. The rental cost is automatically split among active participants in your squad from their FitCoins wallet.
landing.group_chat_desc: Communicate in real time with your squad, organize games, share memes, and keep the passion of the game alive.
landing.map_desc: Visualize the 35 districts of metropolitan Lima in an interactive map with a 'Night Mode' filter. Find your ideal sports complex for padel or soccer in a georeferenced way.
landing.challenges_desc: Complete weekly challenges to accumulate FitCoins and redeem them in our Marketplace. Stay active and level up.

onboarding.step1_subtitle: Select the traditional sports and e-sports titles you play.
onboarding.step2_subtitle: Select your level to calculate your competitive weight and ensure fair matches.
onboarding.skill_amateur_desc: Ideal for fun, learning, and socializing without pressure.
onboarding.skill_amateur_details: Weight 1.0 · Suitable for purely recreational leagues and casual friendly matches.
onboarding.skill_intermedio_desc: For players with experience and basic rule knowledge.
onboarding.skill_intermedio_details: Weight 2.0 · Suitable for competitive friendly matches and standard local tournaments.
onboarding.skill_avanzado_desc: Focused on tactical play, fast pace, and higher skill.
onboarding.skill_avanzado_details: Weight 3.5 · Designed for regular competitive leagues, advanced matches, and challenging tournaments.
onboarding.skill_pro_desc: Intended for competitive leagues and high-intensity tournaments.
onboarding.skill_pro_details: Weight 5.0 · Intended for competitive leagues and high-intensity professional tournaments.
onboarding.step3_subtitle: Adjust the interactive sliders to fine-tune your weekly matchmaking.
onboarding.streak_footer: Verified attendance days light up in Neon Green.
onboarding.streak_footer_plain: Verified attendance days light up in Neon Green.
onboarding.streak_footer_prefix: Verified attendance days light up in
onboarding.weight_disclosure_am: Amateur (Weight: 1.0) - Ideal for fun and socializing without pressure.
onboarding.weight_disclosure_adv: Advanced (Weight: 3.5) - Designed for regular competitive leagues.
onboarding.weight_disclosure_pro: Pro (Weight: 5.0) - Intended for high-intensity leagues and tournaments.

security.title: Segurança
security.change_password_help: Mínimo 8 caracteres, com letras e números
security.password_too_short: A senha deve ter pelo menos 8 caracteres
security.password_weak: A senha deve conter letras e números
security.two_factor_help: Adiciona uma camada extra com códigos TOTP
security.delete_account_contact: Para excluir sua conta, entre em contato com suporte@sportmatch.com pelo e-mail cadastrado.
security.delete_account_warning: Esta ação é permanente. Todos os seus dados serão excluídos. Digite EXCLUIR para confirmar.
security.delete_account_success: Sua conta foi excluída. Seus dados foram anonimizados.

blocked.title: Usuários bloqueados
blocked.dialog_help: Busque a pessoa e adicione um motivo opcional. Não poderá te ver nem te contatar.

data.title: Meus dados
data.export_data_help: Obtenha uma cópia de todos os seus dados (perfil, posts, partidas, transações, etc.) em formato JSON. Leva alguns segundos.
data.what_included: O que está incluído na exportação?
data.includes_posts: Todos os seus posts e comentários
data.includes_matches: Histórico de partidas criadas e jogadas
data.includes_transactions: Todas as suas transações de FitCoins
data.privacy_note: Seus dados são seus. SportMatch nunca os vende ou compartilha com terceiros. Esta exportação cumpre GDPR e políticas de privacidade LATAM.

errors.no_session: Sua sessão expirou. Faça login novamente.
errors.unauthorized: Você não tem permissão para fazer isso.
errors.rate_limited: Muitas requisições. Aguarde um momento e tente de novo.
errors.server: O servidor teve um problema. Tente de novo em alguns segundos.
errors.network: Sem conexão com a internet. Verifique sua rede e tente de novo.
errors.timeout: A requisição demorou demais. Tente de novo.
errors.unknown: Algo deu errado. Tente de novo.

offline.banner: Sem conexao. Mostrando os ultimos dados salvos.
